brand.name: komektes
brand.tagline: Help your neighbours. Get help back.

landing.heroSubtitle: Find someone who can help — or offer your own skills. Free, hourly, fixed price, or just a favour.
landing.emptyDesc: Be the first to post an offer or a request.
landing.offersDesc: Tutoring, repairs, errands, design, code — share what you can do.
landing.requestsDesc: Ask your community for help. Pay what's fair, or pay nothing.
landing.howStep1Desc: Email code or Google. Set a Telegram handle so people can reach you.
landing.howStep2Desc: Create offers and requests with category, tags, and pricing.
landing.howStep3Desc: Chat on Telegram. Mark the deal complete and leave a rating.

notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.message: Something went wrong while loading this page. You can try again or return home.

login.signInDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in code.

onboarding.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.desc: A short profile so other people know who they're talking to.
onboarding.completeProfileDesc: A short profile so other people know who they're talking to.
onboarding.bioHelp: Optional. Shown on your public profile.
onboarding.telegramHelp: Other signed-in users will see this on your listings.
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: What you can help with, languages you speak, etc.
onboarding.signOutDifferent: Sign out / use a different account

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noOffers: No offers yet — post something you can help with.
dashboard.noRequests: No requests yet — ask the community for help.

browse.title: Browse listings
browse.subtitle: Help offered and requested by people near you.

listingForm.createDesc: Tell the community what you can offer or what you need.
listingForm.newDesc: Tell the community what you can offer or what you need.
listingForm.editDesc: Update the details of your listing.

kindHelp.offer: Something you can do for others.

listingForm.title: Title
listingForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what's included, your experience, scheduling, etc.
listingForm.categoryHelp: Free-text. Keep it short and consistent.
listingForm.tagsHelp: Comma-separated. Helps people find your listing.

listingDetail.author: Author
listingDetail.contactNote: Reach out on Telegram to discuss details.
listingDetail.signInToContact: Sign in to see contact info and connect.

engagement.activeDesc: Mark this complete after the help was provided. You'll then be able to leave a rating.
engagement.alreadyReviewed: You've already reviewed this engagement. Thanks!

profile.signInToSeeContact: Sign in to see contact info.

validation.displayNameMax: Display name must be 80 characters or fewer
validation.telegramInvalid: Enter a valid Telegram username (3-32 chars: letters, digits, _)
validation.cityMax: City must be 80 characters or fewer
validation.bioMax: Bio must be 500 characters or fewer
validation.titleMax: Title must be 120 characters or fewer
validation.descriptionMax: Description must be 4000 characters or fewer
validation.categoryMax: Category must be 60 characters or fewer
validation.priceMinInvalid: Minimum price must be a positive number
validation.priceMaxInvalid: Maximum price must be a positive number
validation.priceRangeInvalid: Maximum price must be greater than or equal to minimum
validation.priceRequired: Price is required for this pricing mode
validation.reviewTextMax: Review must be 1000 characters or fewer

auth.required: You need to sign in to do that.
